x.summary:
Claude Tag is a paradigm shift in how we ship products at Anthropic. Our internal version merges 65% of product PRs and this is our first product that is natively multi-player and proactive.

We're excited for you to try this out. Let us know your feedback!

x.title: AI in 2040 will not be built on the stack we are using today. It will be much closer to optimal. The current stack has 3
x.summary:
AI in 2040 will not be built on the stack we are using today. It will be much closer to optimal. The current stack has 3-4 orders of magnitude of data inefficiency and 4-5 orders of magnitude of compute inefficiency.

Near-optimal AI is what symbolic learning will deliver.
x.author: fchollet

blogs.title: OPFS + Pyodide test harness
blogs.summary:
Tool: OPFS + Pyodide test harness

I've been pondering if Datasette Lite - the Python Datasette application run entirely in the browser using Pyodide and WebAssembly - might be able to edit persistent SQLite files stored on the user's computer.

That's what OFPS (Origin Private File System) is for, so I had Claude Code for web build me this playground UI to try it out in different browsers.

Tags: browsers, pyodide, datasette-lite

blogs.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
blogs.summary: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.

videos.title: ChatGPT Futures, Class of 2026: The Next Generation of AI Leaders
videos.summary:
We asked the ChatGPT Futures Class of 2026 what they hope AI helps people do next.

Their answers came back to access, education, connection, and possibility: AI that helps close gaps instead of widening them, gives more people the tools to learn and build, and creates more room for the human parts of life.
videos.author: OpenAI
